end,{},function(t,j)local v=o(j)local q=function(...)return C(t,{...},j,v)end return q end,function(t)local j,C=-1019292+1019293,t[-997785+997786]while C do return(A(-655460+1145295,{}))(v(E))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[j(793910+-813083)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
